regional_cost_note: Electricians in New Plymouth typically charge $75–$105/hr + GST for a registered/qualified electrician. Emergency callouts and after-hours work attract surcharges. Taranaki regional rates sit below Auckland/Wellington ($95–$130/hr + GST).

businesses.name: Electric Avenue Taranaki
businesses.known_for: Residential, rural, commercial, industrial, and agricultural/poultry electrical services with 24/7 industrial plant coverage and SKOV technician capability.

businesses.name: Central Taranaki Electrical
businesses.known_for: General residential and commercial electrical work across Taranaki, consistently praised for quality and customer service.

businesses.name: Taranaki Electrical Services
businesses.known_for: New Plymouth's longest-established electrical contractor covering residential, commercial, and industrial work including solar, home automation, and emergency lighting design.

businesses.name: HEL Rimu Ltd
businesses.known_for: Broad Taranaki-wide coverage across domestic, commercial, industrial, rural, and poultry sectors — formed by the merger of two established local firms in 2019.

businesses.name: Ideal Electrical New Plymouth
businesses.known_for: Electrical supply and service trade counter well regarded for stock availability and helpful staff for both trade and DIY customers.

businesses.name: Laser Electrical New Plymouth
businesses.known_for: Part of the national Laser Group network, offering residential and commercial electrical work alongside plumbing and gas services.

businesses.name: PERL Electrical
businesses.known_for: 24/7 commercial fit-outs, EV charging, solar, and industrial instrumentation specialists. Transparent published rates at $75/hr + GST.

businesses.name: Phasetech Electrical
businesses.known_for: General domestic and commercial electrical work including heat pumps, security systems, and data cabling across New Plymouth.

businesses.name: KES Electrical
